'''鈭歽-j-m-ch''' ('''kayajmechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yawl|yawl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yawl|yawl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-j-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kayajmechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyajmechoko|thiyajmechoko]] || [[word:jiyajmechoko|jiyajmechoko]] || [[word:shiyajmechoko|shiyajmechoko]] || [[word:kiyajmechoko|kiyajmechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyajmechoko|thoyajmechoko]] || [[word:joyajmechoko|joyajmechoko]] || [[word:shoyajmechoko|shoyajmechoko]] || [[word:koyajmechoko|koyajmechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yajmechoko|th忙yajmechoko]] || [[word:j忙yajmechoko|j忙yajmechoko]] || [[word:sh忙yajmechoko|sh忙yajmechoko]] || [[word:k忙yajmechoko|k忙yajmechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayajmechoko|thayajmechoko]] || [[word:jayajmechoko|jayajmechoko]] || [[word:shayajmechoko|shayajmechoko]] || [[word:kayajmechoko|kayajmechoko]]
|-
